title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing high-confidence signals days in advance to enable early evacuation warnings. The model is designed to forecast volatile tropical storms and hurricanes by predicting structure and intensity changes.
